stemHtml:
Refer to figure or chart "E LO 2" from Jeppesen GSPRM 2017. 
A flight is planned along route T420, course 330°, FL380, inbound TRENT VOR/DME (TNT). A descent should be initiated to pass waypoint ELVOS in FL200. Calculate the Top of Descent (ToD) relating to TRENT for a ground speed of 200 kt and a rate of descent of 1500 ft/min.

(Note: when using the original chart from GSPRM both locations can be found in chart section 7 C)
